creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
Created attachment 221809
A diff updating net-im/py-matrix-synapse from 1.24.0 to 1.25.0

This patch updates net-im/py-matrix-synapse from 1.24.0 to 1.25.0. The release notes are included in the PR's URL field, but from a ports perspective this is a simple version bump. The deprecation notices for python and postgres are not yet relevant for us, so the update should be fine regardless of the python version supported by the port or the postgres version currently available in FreeBSD.

portlint: "OK" (3 Warnings, none new)
testport: OK (poudriere: 122amd64)
do-test: OK (Ran 1419 tests in 656.659s, PASSED (skips=15, successes=1404))

The port has also been running in production here for a few days without any noticable problems. :)

Cheers,
Sascha
